entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#1823 · May 26, 2026 17:01
lissy93 commented May 27, 2026
The adminGroup/adminRole values aren't a username. They match against the groups or roles claim in the OIDC token. A user is treated as admin if t…
